name: Puree of Green Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwavable casserole, combine the first three ingredients. Microwave on High (100%) for 2 minutes, until the margarine is melted. Add 1/2 cup water and microwave on High for 5 minutes, until beans are tender. Let cool slightly.
2. Transfer the mixture to a blender and process until smooth. Add remaining ingredients and process until combined. Return to the casserole and microwave on High for 1 minute, until the mixture thickens slightly and is thoroughly heated.
3. Pour soup into 2 soup bowls and garnish each portion with 3 trimmed chives.
Approximate Total time: 20 Minutes
Each Serving provides: 1/2 Milk, 1/2 Fat, 3 Vegetables, 20 Calories
Per serving: 138 Calories; 7g protein; 4g fat; 21g carbohydrates; 211 mg calcium; 116 mg sodium; 5 mg cholesterol; 3g dietary fiber
